en-us.html:
To maintain their cohesion, the Ordis must call on the most reliable of couriers.

Story

393 AC - The recruits hurry to collect their rations. I walk past them. Many of them think the odyssey is a time for rest, but it's not a peaceful rest. The Leviathans prowling overhead and under the clouds are to blame for that. But what can you really do against such monsters? We're like ants trying to stand up to the shadow of a boot. Nina fills her bowl with great care, and Helder takes a big helping of stew. I scan the crowd, looking for Kojo, who must be in the line somewhere. I don't know what's bothering him, but he's been lost in his thoughts recently. He seems worried. He's not speaking much. And that's not like him. He's distracted as well… But that is like him.

As I look around the sea of faces, I notice Osoyo. He smiles at me and nods, and I do the same. Maybe that's his way of thanking me for coming to his rescue during his last descent into the Crow's Eye. Or maybe it's because I supported his candidacy for joining the Tagmata. The last I heard, he'd joined Zhen's Raptors. Yes, he'd had experience in working alongside an Exalt. But he was also just a good recruit, as I'd suspected from the start. He deserved all the credit, and the promotion was definitely justified. I leave him chatting with the rest of his squad, and I turn away. And I'm well aware that I'm smiling at the same time.

Narrator

GULRANG

blocks.text: To maintain their cohesion, the Ordis must call on the most reliable of couriers.

blocks.title: Story

Maybe that's his way of thanking me for coming to his rescue during his last descent into the Crow's Eye. Or maybe it's because I supported his candidacy for joining the Tagmata. fr-fr.html:
Pour maintenir leur cohésion, les Ordis doivent faire appel aux plus fiables des estafettes.

Histoire

393 AC - Les recrues se pressent pour collecter leurs rations. Je passe à côté d'elles. L'odyssée est pour une grande partie d'entre elles synonyme de repos, mais c'est un repos troublé. La faute aux Léviathans qui rôdent au-dessus et sous les nuages. Mais que peut-on faire, au juste, face à de tels monstres ? C'est comme si une fourmi défiait l'ombre d'une botte. Nina remplit son écuelle religieusement, et Hélder se sert une grande louche de ragoût. Je regarde dans la foule, à la recherche de Kojo, sûrement en train de faire la queue quelque part. Je ne sais pas ce qu'il a, mais il est perdu dans ses pensées, ces derniers temps. Soucieux. Mutique. Ce qui ne lui ressemble pas. Distrait, aussi. Mais ça, il l'a toujours été.

Alors que je scrute l'assistance, mon regard croise celui d'Osoyo. Il me sourit tout en me saluant d'un signe de tête, que je lui rends. Peut-être est-ce une façon de me remercier de lui avoir sauvé la mise durant sa dernière descente dans l'Œil du Corbeau, ou bien d'avoir appuyé sa candidature au sein du Tagmata. Aux dernières nouvelles, il avait rejoint les Rapaces de Zhen. D'une part, il avait l'expérience de travailler aux côtés d'un Exalt. Et de l'autre... c'était tout simplement une bonne recrue, comme je l'avais suspecté dès le départ. Le mérite lui revenait entièrement, et cette promotion était plus que légitime. Je le laisse discuter avec les autres membres de son escouade et me détourne. Et je suis bien consciente de sourire en le faisant.

Narré par

GULRANG

blocks.text: Pour maintenir leur cohésion, les Ordis doivent faire appel aux plus fiables des estafettes.
